name_en: M81539 Green Suit Wallet made of Calfskin, renowned for its craftsmanship, LV combines rare designs and special leathers with innovative technology and classic styles. The Monogram Purple Suit Wallet highlights the world's presence. The wallet features a unique and exquisite interior design with various pockets and credit card slots. Dimensions: 19×10cm
